atomic_facts.fact: The video transitions from a heavy radial blur effect to a clear static slide.
The slide contains a 'Did you know?' header.
The text states the potato was the first vegetable grown in space in October 1995.
The text states potatoes are 80% water and 20% solids.

ocr: In October 1995, the potato became the first vegetable to be grown in space, also - the potato is about 80% water and only 20% solids.
spatial: The clip starts with a full-screen radial blur of beige and white tones, which quickly resolves into a centered informational text card filling the frame.
